ocr_findings.description: Cookie diagram (img-1.jpeg) contains step labels ① IDとパスワードでログイン, ② クッキーを発行, ③ クッキーを送信して自動ログイン embedded in the illustration. These are not extracted as OCR text. The prose description captures the concept but the numbered steps are image-only.

reviewer_notes: Page covers RSS (bottom of previous section) and cookie introduction. The RSS illustration and cookie flow diagram are represented as image references. Main explanatory prose for both topics is fully captured. The diagram step numbers being image-only is a low-severity gap since the prose explains the concept adequately.
